LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-30-2020 HEARING RE: TURNFORD RESTRUCTURING GROUP'S MOTION FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF ANCILLARY RECEIVER, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY DID NOT SERVE AND FILE THE MOVING PAPERS AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT THE NOTICE OF HEARING FILED DECEMBER 11 STATES THAT THE HEARING DATE IS "DECEMBER 28, 2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. [SIC]," BUT THE CAPTION INDICATES THAT THE HEARING DATE IS DECEMBER 30. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

Motion For The Appointment Of Ancillary Receiver
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: TURNFORD RESTRUCTURING GROUP's Motion For The Appointment Of Ancillary Receiver.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted. No opposition filed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Receivers Motion For The Appointment Of Ancillary Receiver
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: TURNFORD RESTRUCTURING GROUP's Motion For The Appointment Of Ancillary Receiver

No appearances made ih this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Proof of service rejected for filing 1/5/21. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.1300(c) ["Proof of service of the moving papers must be filed no later than five court days before the time appointed for the hearing."].)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Motion For The Appointment Of Ancillary Receiver
Off Calendar Dec-30-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: TURNFORD RESTRUCTURING GROUP's Motion For The Appointment Of Ancillary Receiver.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter off calendar. The moving party did not serve and file the moving papers at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). The Court also notes that the Notice of Hearing filed December 11 states that the hearing date is "December 28, 2020 at 9:30 AM in Dept. [sic]," but the caption indicates that the hearing date is December 30.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2020 Off Calendar
